phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, posso ordinare al banco, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, POS-soh or-dee-NAH-reh al BAN-koh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, at the bar is possible.

responses.english: Yes, at the bar is possible.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa un bignè, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAHN-toh COS-tah oon bee-NYEH, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the counter.

responses.english: It is indicated at the counter.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove sono i servizi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh DOH-veh SOH-noh ee ser-VEE-tsee per fa-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Sono in fondo al locale, a destra.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOH-noh EEN FOHN-doh AHL loh-KAH-leh AH DEH-strah
likely_response.translation_en: They are at the back of the shop, on the right.

responses.english: They are at the back of the shop, on the right.
responses.phonetic: SOH-noh EEN FOHN-doh AHL loh-KAH-leh AH DEH-strah
responses.french: Sono in fondo al locale, a destra.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si paga, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see PAH-gah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the cashier, near the exit.

responses.english: At the cashier, near the exit.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora aprite, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah ah-PREE-teh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.
